summary: Focana 1.7.1 is a stability hotfix for the 1.7 release, focused on making wake, pause, and floating-mode handoffs feel dependable again.
fixes: Fixed a macOS window issue that could make Focana close unexpectedly during floating or Session Wrap handoffs.
Fixed the Done for now path from Pause so Focana reliably returns to the floating icon instead of disappearing from view.
Fixed wake re-entry timing so Focana opens the return-to-work prompt promptly after your Mac wakes.
Improved packaged smoke coverage for pause, floating, and wake-related handoffs so these flows are checked before release.
